clips.title: The Pass
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, shallow depth of field, natural light. Present day. A frantic professional kitchen at dinner rush, stainless-steel counters, flaming burners, a row of order tickets, steam and heat haze. Night, intense. A person in a white chef's jacket plates a dish with tweezers at the pass, focused and glistening with sweat, glancing up as the camera pushes in. Copper pans, a flare of fire, rushing line cooks blurred behind. Warm practical kitchen light. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Energetic cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Speech
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, shallow depth of field, natural light. Present day. A worn team locker room, metal lockers, a chalkboard of plays, benches strewn with gear. Pre-game, charged. A person in a coach's jacket delivers an impassioned speech, jaw set, leaning forward as the camera pushes toward them. Hanging jerseys, a whiteboard, tense teammates out of focus. Cool overhead light with a warm side lamp. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Intense cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Result
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, shallow depth of field, natural light. Present day. A cluttered research lab, racks of glass beakers, monitors of scrolling data, a spinning centrifuge. Late night. A person in a lab coat leans back from a microscope and looks up in dawning realization as the camera pushes in, breath held. Pipettes, glowing screens, scattered notes. Cool lab light with monitor glow. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Suspenseful cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Walkout
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, shallow depth of field, natural light. Present day. A dark stadium tunnel, raw concrete walls, a blaze of light and a distant roar at the far end, haze in the air. Night, adrenaline. A person in athletic warmup gear walks toward the light, hood up, fists clenching, as the camera pushes ahead of them. Flickering tunnel lights, hanging banners, a dropped water bottle. Cool tunnel dark against bright field light. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Charged cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Mic
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, shallow depth of field, dramatic stage light. Night. A dim concert stage, a single hard spotlight, a vintage microphone on a stand, haze drifting, a vast dark crowd beyond. A person in stage clothes steps to the microphone and grips it, eyes closed in a held breath, as the camera pushes in. Cables, monitor wedges, distant phone lights like stars. Spotlight against deep dark. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Dramatic cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Summit
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, shallow depth of field, natural light. Present day. A wind-blasted mountain summit, snow and dark rock, a vast cloud sea far below, a fixed rope snapping in the wind. Day, triumphant. A person in mountaineering gear crests the ridge and stands upright, exhausted and elated, as the camera pushes in toward them against the open sky. An ice axe, whipping snow, a small summit flag. Bright cold light. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Soaring cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Table
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, shallow depth of field, low lamp light. Night. A smoky private card room, a green-felt table, tall stacks of chips, a low hanging lamp, shadowed players. Tense. A person in a sharp suit sits at the table sliding chips forward, unreadable, eyes lifting slowly, as the camera pushes in. Playing cards, a whiskey glass, curling cigar smoke. Warm pooled lamp light against the dark. Handheld push-in, organic movement. Tense cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.
